body:
Closes #647.

## Summary

- auto-start a temporary `formal-ai serve --agent-mode` when the selected loopback port is idle, reuse an existing listener, print a security notice, and retain both `--start-server` and the new `--no-start-server` escape hatch
- disable Agent CLI session summarization/remote compaction by default with `--no-summarize-session --compaction-model same`; restore client defaults with `--summarize` / `--keep-summarization`
- isolate one-shot Codex and Agent runs in temporary homes so non-global invocations do not alter persistent client configuration
- add seed-driven Claude Code, Qwen Code, Grok Build, and Aider integrations alongside Codex, OpenCode, Agent, and Gemini
- document all single-line and persistent setup forms and add a changelog fragment

## Reproduction and verification

Before this change, `formal-ai with agent -p "hi"` required a separately started server, Agent retained its normal summarization behavior, and the four new tools were unsupported.

Automated coverage now verifies:

- idle-port auto-start in agent mode and teardown after the wrapped CLI exits
- reuse of an existing loopback listener
- default Agent no-summarization arguments and the summarization escape hatch
- exact protocol environment/model arguments for Claude, Qwen, Grok, and Aider
- unchanged persistent config files for all eight non-global integrations

A real installed Agent CLI run also completed successfully with no manual configuration:

```text
formal-ai: started a temporary server in agent mode (tool and shell execution enabled)
Hi, how may I help you?
```

## Tests

- `cargo test --test integration with_formal_ai -- --nocapture` (12 passed)
- `cargo test --test unit docs_requirements_issue_606::issue_606_with_formal_ai_docs_and_seed_templates_are_traceable`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `git diff --check`
- full `cargo test` regression pass executed 1,463 tests; its single stale README traceability assertion was corrected and rerun successfully above

commits.messageBody:
Adding .gitkeep for PR creation (default mode).
This file will be removed when the task is complete.

Issue: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/647

commits.messageHeadline: feat: make CLI wrappers zero-config by default

title: Make formal-ai with zero-config across agent CLIs
